schema.title: Response Search Furniture Furniture Search Get
Response Similar Furniture Furniture Similar Get
Response List Design Objects Designs  Id  Objects Get

DesignCreateRequest.title: DesignCreateRequest
DesignCreateRequest.description: Payload for POST /designs. `shell` + `objects` are the raw RoomPlan capture.

DesignPublic.title: DesignPublic
DesignPublic.description: API-facing design document with `_id` normalised to `id`.

FurnitureItemPublic.title: FurnitureItemPublic
FurnitureItemPublic.description: API-facing furniture document with `_id` normalized to `id` and embeddings stripped.

FurnitureSnapshot-Input.title: FurnitureSnapshot
FurnitureSnapshot-Input.description:
Catalog snapshot embedded in a placement so the iOS client can render
without re-fetching catalog rows. `id` references the full FurnitureItem.

FurnitureSnapshot-Output.title: FurnitureSnapshot
FurnitureSnapshot-Output.description:
Catalog snapshot embedded in a placement so the iOS client can render
without re-fetching catalog rows. `id` references the full FurnitureItem.

MatchedObject.title: MatchedObject
MatchedObject.description: Per-object result returned by the matching pipeline.

Mutations.title: Mutations
Mutations.description:
Concrete changes the agent applied to the design during this turn.
Empty when the turn was purely passive (recommendations only).

Opening.title: Opening
Opening.description:
A door, window, or open passageway. `bottom_height` is the sill height
above the floor; `is_open` is only set on doors.

PlacedObject-Input.title: PlacedObject
PlacedObject-Input.description:
A single piece of furniture placed in the design. `id` is a per-instance
UUID — it allows multiple copies of the same SKU in one room.

PlacedObject-Output.title: PlacedObject
PlacedObject-Output.description:
A single piece of furniture placed in the design. `id` is a per-instance
UUID — it allows multiple copies of the same SKU in one room.

Recommendation.title: Recommendation
Recommendation.description:
A passive suggestion the agent surfaced for the user to consider.
`suggested_position` is populated when the agent has a specific spot in mind.

RoomShell.title: RoomShell
RoomShell.description:
Static room geometry from a single RoomPlan capture. Combined with
`Design.objects`, this is the full scene the iOS client renders.

Wall.title: Wall
Wall.description:
`start`/`end` are the wall's footprint endpoints on the xz plane;
`center` is the 3D midpoint of the wall surface.
